# Diving-analytics-platform Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-11-27

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.x, React 18.x, Next.js (Pages Router) + React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Recharts, Framer Motion (001-diving-analytics-mvp)
- MySQL (via NestJS backend API) (001-diving-analytics-mvp)

- MySQL 8.x via NestJS backend (002-ui-overhaul)

- Python 3.11 (worker), TypeScript 5.x (backend/frontend) (001-diving-analytics-mvp)
